segments.text: All this I have told you so that you will not fall away.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They will put you out of the synagogue; in fact, the time is coming when anyone who kills you will think they are offering a service to God.
They will do such things because they have not known the Father or me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I have told you this, so that when their time comes you will remember that I warned you about them. I did not tell you this from the beginning because I was with you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But now I am going to him who sent me. None of you asks me, 'Where are you going?'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Rather, you are filled with grief because I have said these things.
But very truly I tell you, it is for your good that I am going away. Unless I go away, the Advocate will not come to you; but if I go, I will send him to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When he comes, he will prove the world to be in the wrong about sin and righteousness and judgment:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: about sin, because people do not believe in me;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: about righteousness, because I am going to the Father, where you can see me no longer;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and about judgment, because the prince of this world now stands condemned.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I have much more to say to you, more than you can now bear.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when he, the Spirit of truth, comes, he will guide you into all the truth. He will not speak on his own; he will speak only what he hears, and he will tell you what is yet to come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He will glorify me because it is from me that he will receive what he will make known to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All that belongs to the Father is mine. That is why I said the Spirit will receive from me what he will make known to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Disciples' Grief Will Turn to Joy

segments.text: Jesus went on to say,
In a little while you will see me no more, and then after a little while you will see me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: At this, some of his disciples said to one another,
What does he mean by saying, 'In a little while you will see me no more, and then after a little while you will see me,' and 'Because I am going to the Father'?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: They kept asking,
What does he mean by 'a little while'? We don't understand what he is saying.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Jesus saw that they wanted to ask him about this, so he said to them,
Are you asking one another what I meant when I said, 'In a little while you will see me no more, and then after a little while you will see me'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Very truly I tell you, you will weep and mourn while the world rejoices. You will grieve, but your grief will turn to joy.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A woman giving birth to a child has pain because her time has come; but when her baby is born she forgets the anguish because of her joy that a child is born into the world.
So with you: Now is your time of grief, but I will see you again and you will rejoice, and no one will take away your joy.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: In that day you will no longer ask me anything. Very truly I tell you, my Father will give you whatever you ask in my name.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Until now you have not asked for anything in my name. Ask and you will receive, and your joy will be complete.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Though I have been speaking figuratively, a time is coming when I will no longer use this kind of language but will tell you plainly about my Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: In that day you will ask in my name. I am not saying that I will ask the Father on your behalf.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: No, the Father himself loves you because you have loved me and have believed that I came from God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I came from the Father and entered the world; now I am leaving the world and going back to the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now you are speaking clearly and without figures of speech.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Now we can see that you know all things and that you do not even need to have anyone ask you questions. This makes us believe that you came from God.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Do you now believe?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A time is coming and in fact has come when you will be scattered, each to your own home. You will leave me all alone. Yet I am not alone, for my Father is with me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I have told you these things, so that in me you may have peace. In this world you will have trouble. But take heart! I have overcome the world.
segments.speaker: Jesus
